item.title: Binarios BIOS netbook gobierno
item.description: Binarios y CH341A programador: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Ps1OzNOGPYFCNRZjHnWoU-hdQ8O-Yknc Backup: Binarios: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1KKZFmejxhf8V5m7NlPW7DUnX0mIVopFm/view?usp=sharing CH341A programador: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1W4p-2VgvZbA93FWIWJ7SWmHCuCgd58_f/view?usp=sharing Videos sobre como desarmar la netbook y como usar la pinza. https://youtube.com/watch?v=R1FkJnQwl0g https://youtube.com/watch?v=Qx2h6_UifKM https://youtube.com/watch?v=Dj77cCAqtoc https://youtube.com/watch?v=QmXHXhGWpcM
